section_miscategorizations.text: Lung exam reveals fine crackles bilaterally and trace lower extremity edema.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an objective physical exam finding, not patient-reported history or symptoms, and belongs in the Findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Skin biopsy results are pending review.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is more of a past history / pending test result rather than a current exam, lab, or imaging finding; it fits better in history but does not substantially mislead the reader where it is.

This is correctly a plan item, but it duplicates the preceding prescription statement; while not a miscategorization across sections, it may cause confusion about whether this is a new order versus continuation. (Included here for completeness; no section change needed.)
